title: Explicit mode= field: open_lane.py + dispatch_optimizer.py fix

problem.description: L-766 found 0% mode-shift adoption across 8 multi-wave campaigns. Root cause: mode inferred from intent= keyword matching in dispatch_optimizer.py. Intent field often omitted or generic. 100% of multi-wave lanes misclassified as exploration.

behavior: Includes mode=X in Etc column when specified
For 2nd+ wave lanes: WARN if mode repeats previous wave (valley-of-death signal)
For 2nd+ wave lanes: WARN if --mode omitted (prompt to make explicit)
For 2nd+ wave lanes: INFO if mode shift detected (positive reinforcement)

dispatch_optimizer.py.behavior: Prefers explicit mode= field over keyword inference from intent=

tests.actual: WARN: mode=exploration repeats previous wave mode for F-STR3. Mode-repeat is the #1 predictor of valley-of-death stalls (L-755/L-766). Consider a different mode: hardening, replication, resolution
INFO: mode shift exploration → hardening for F-STR3 — mode transition increases resolution probability (L-755).
WARN: F-STR3 has prior lane(s) (last mode: ...). Consider --mode to make campaign progression explicit.

tests.expected: no errors, still shows 11 unresolved campaigns

diff_from_expect.expected: open_lane.py gains --mode param; dispatch_optimizer uses explicit mode= not keyword intent; 2nd+ wave warns on mode repeat
diff_from_expect.actual: All 3 expected behaviors implemented. Additional: advisory WARN when --mode omitted for multi-wave frontier (not just repeat).
diff_from_expect.unexpected: Dispatch_optimizer wave plan output unchanged (no new explicit modes to consume yet — all historical lanes used keyword inference)

open_questions: Will agents actually use --mode when opening lanes? Adoption requires doc update or enforced required field.
Should --mode be REQUIRED (not optional) for 2nd+ wave lanes? Current design warns but doesn't block.
Prospective test: do explicit mode= lanes have higher resolution rate than keyword-inferred ones?
verdict: IMPLEMENTED — fix addresses bottleneck identified in L-766. Adoption is voluntary; consider making required for 2nd+ wave lanes in future.
